/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/comal-lsp.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/comal-lsp.dir/tools/comal_lsp.cpp.o" -o comal-lsp  libcomal_lsp.a ../libcomal-runtime/libcomal-runtime.a ../libcomal-parser/libcomal-parser.a ../libcomal-sound/libcomal-sound.a -lfluidsynth /usr/lib64/libQt6Multimedia.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Network.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.3 ../libcomal-graphics/libcomal-graphics.a
